candidates.why: Appears as a separate operating line between broader cost-of-sales rows. The selected COGS row 'Cost of Goods and Services Sold' looks like a component subtotal that excludes this D&A, because the broader cost row above is approximately the sum of selected COGS + this D&A + restructuring.
Generic D&A row is blank in the visible operating section and provides no usable separate amount.

variables.notes: Selected only the explicit COGS/COR D&A row because it appears separate from, not embedded in, the chosen COGS bucket.

candidates.why: There are two occurrences. The first sits with Sales and marketing costs/expenses and appears separate from the selected 'Sales and marketing expenses' row, suggesting it should be added. The second sits with 'General and administration costs' and appears embedded within that selected parent total, so it should not be added separately.

Although it appears separate from the selected 'Product development expenses - Balancing value' row, the above-operating-profit R&D row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D D&A separately would likely distort the intended XSGA minus XRD construction.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Looks like a component/detail of R&D amortization, not preferred over the broader R&D D&A summary row.
Looks like a component or balancing detail under R&D D&A rather than the preferred summary row.
Generic D&A row is blank in the visible operating section and not usable.

variables.notes: Manual review needed because 'Depreciation/Amortization in SGA' appears twice with the same exact label: one occurrence seems to be a separate S&M add-back, while the other seems embedded in selected G&A. The schema cannot uniquely identify only the first occurrence without risking double counting. R&D D&A was excluded because the R&D expense row is already selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
